steps.title: Set up the area equation
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width: $$x(x-12)=85$$.

steps.title: Backsolving by testing the candidate
steps.content: Backsolving by testing the candidate (17): compute 17 * (17-12) = 17 * 5 = 85, which equals the given area. That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
